package rulecoverage

func PositiveStrconvRepeatOnSameBinding() string {
    ruleID := "strconv_repeat_on_same_binding"
    family := "hot_path"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "The same string binding is converted with strconv parsing helpers multiple times in one function."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
